title: Better Farmlife
description: Better Farmlife adds small farming quality-of-life features for animals, crops, and farm HUD info.
body:
Better Farmlife adds small farming quality-of-life features for animals, crops, and farm HUD info.

Features:
- Animals can walk to and eat dropped breeding food
- Valid dropped animal food lasts longer before despawning
- Fully grown crops can be harvested and replanted with a hoe
- Right-click hoe harvesting for mature crops
- Sneaking disables hoe auto-replant
- Replanting can play a sound and show subtle particles
- Sugar cane can be bone-mealed
- Crop growth HUD when looking at crops
- Animal breeding cooldown HUD when looking at animals
- Chicken egg timer HUD
- Config options for all major features

Supported crop HUD examples include wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroots, nether wart, melon stems, pumpkin stems, sugar cane, cactus, and other vanilla crop-like plants.

Supported loaders:
- Fabric
- Forge
- NeoForge
